desc: Almaty is Kazakhstan's most rewarding city-and-mountains base, combining cafe life, Soviet-era boulevards, leafy neighborhoods, and fast access into the northern Tien Shan. It works best for travelers who want a real city with strong food and culture, but also want alpine day trips close enough that the mountains shape the whole stay.
hls: A rare big-city plus mountain-edge balance
Medeu and Shymbulak close enough for same-day plans
Big Almaty Lake and Ile Alatau scenery nearby
Strong cafe, food, and market culture
Winter skating and ski appeal plus summer hiking access
Current London Heathrow nonstop route, but no LGW or LCY direct badge

todo.name: Medeu Alpine Skating Rink
todo.desc: Use Medeu as the easiest way to feel Almaty's high-mountain setting without leaving the city orbit for a full expedition day.

todo.name: Shymbulak cable car day
todo.desc: Ride up for ski-season access or summer viewpoints, because Shymbulak is the clearest city-to-alpine transition.

todo.name: Big Almaty Lake outing
todo.desc: Plan this as a weather-sensitive scenic block where clear light matters more than checking off the drive.

todo.name: Kok Tobe or city viewpoint
todo.desc: Give one evening to a city-over-mountains perspective so the urban layout and foothill setting click together.

todo.name: Green Bazaar and food crawl
todo.desc: Use the market and nearby eating streets to make the city feel local rather than only a launchpad for day trips.

todo.name: Cafe-and-boulevard block
todo.desc: Keep one slower stretch for Almaty's leafy, lived-in side, especially if the mountains are cloudy.

wifi.note: Strong in central hotels, apartments, cafes, and coworking-style venues; mountain areas and fringe trailheads are less consistent.

prac.fltNote: Almaty itself has a major airport and current nonstop London Heathrow service, but not from the repo's Gatwick or London City origins. Treat UK access as Heathrow-direct or one-stop via Istanbul, Doha, Dubai, or other hubs; winter ski weeks, late December, and summer mountain season create the clearest fare pressure.
prac.lang: Kazakh and Russian are widely used; English is increasingly workable in hotels, cafes, and younger urban settings.
prac.visa: Kazakhstan entry rules depend on nationality and length of stay, so confirm the latest visa-free or e-visa terms before travel.
bestFor: Nature day trips from a real city
alerts: Winter air quality can be poor in the city basin, so sensitive travelers should check conditions before committing to long outdoor city days.
Mountain roads and visibility can change quickly, especially for lake and high-altitude outings.
The airport is close, but road congestion and construction around access routes can still affect transfer timing.

sweet: May to June and September are Almaty's best all-round windows for city life and foothill outings, while December to February is strongest if you specifically want Medeu, Shymbulak, and winter atmosphere.
